title: papaver bracteatum
intro: Papaver bracteatum, also known as the Chinese poppy or Himalayan poppy, is a species of flowering plant in the poppy family (Papaveraceae) native to Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues such as wounds, fever, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Papaver bracteatum include reducing pain and inflammation, improving respiratory health, and acting as an expectorant to relieve coughs and congestion. In herbal preparations, the plant's rhizome and root are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
